channel.title: Network on My Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Network on My Notebook

item.title: Linux Open Ports
item.description: lsof sudo lsof -i -P -n | grep LISTEN -i: list open ports -P: dont convert port numbers to names -n: don’t do reverse dns lookups ss netstat has been deprecated. ss is its replacement. sudo ss -tulpn | grep LISTEN -t: tcp -u: udp -l: listenng sockets -p: process id of listening process -n: don’t do reverse dns lookups
